title: Agentic tool loop duplicated across TUI, ACP, and REPL (Stovepipe)
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Stovepipe Systems / DRY
Location: src/tui/app.rs:1457-1522 (max_iterations=25); src/acp.rs:555-775 run_prompt_loop (max_iterations=50); src/main.rs::cmd_chat third copy; src/pipeline builds but has no loop.
Violation: Three isolated implementations of the agentic tool-calling loop. Each builds its own follow-up request, enforces its own iteration cap (25 vs 50 — functional-correctness drift), handles error events differently. Provider-specific assistant-message construction also duplicated.
Mandated Refactor: Extract pub async fn run_agentic_loop(initial_request, max_iterations, event_sink: &dyn AgentEventSink, client, endpoint, headers, provider, memory_db) -> Result. Define trait AgentEventSink { stream_text, tool_start, tool_done, response_done, api_error }. Implement AgentEventSink for each seam (TUI mpsc, ACP stdio, REPL stdout).
